mechanism_narrative: Lower federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and discount rates for future cash flows, directly increasing equity valuations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.2 percentage points over three months signals deteriorating labor market conditions and impending economic contraction, triggering immediate risk-off selling and negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the unemployment spike, or signal accuracy drops below 52% in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent expansion in retail sales and housing starts confirms broad-based consumer demand strength, supporting corporate revenue growth and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS and HOUST both grow > 2% YoY
failure_condition: Joint growth in RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict positive 60d returns (accuracy < 52%) or interaction term loses statistical significance in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indices reflect expanding manufacturing capacity and supply-side momentum, which translates into higher corporate earnings and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO growth predicts negative or flat 20d returns during early-cycle phases, or rolling Rank IC falls below 0.02 across all tested windows.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month CPI increase exceeding 0.3% triggers expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, compressing equity multiples and causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL spikes above 0.3% MoM are followed by positive 5d returns in > 58% of cases, or signal loses predictive power after controlling for FEDFUNDS.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous non-farm payroll growth above 150,000 and unemployment rate decline confirms a tightening labor market that boosts consumer spending and corporate profits, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint condition fails to yield a positive return frequency above 55% over 60 days, or the interaction effect is statistically indistinguishable from zero in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: Higher quarterly real GDP growth reflects stronger aggregate economic activity and corporate revenue expansion, directly supporting equity valuations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: GDPC1 growth shows no statistically significant correlation with 20d forward returns (p > 0.10) or Rank IC remains below 0.01 across all rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month industrial production decline exceeding 0.5% signals immediate supply-side contraction and weakening manufacturing demand, prompting risk-off positioning and negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO drops below -0.5% MoM are followed by positive 5d returns in > 60% of instances, or the signal fails to beat a buy-and-hold benchmark in walk-forward testing.
